description: A simple branching strategy. Never commit directly to main. Every change goes through a feature branch with a pull request and CI checks.
code:
main (protected -- requires PR + CI pass to merge)
  |
  |--- feature/add-user-auth  (developer works here)
  |     |
  |     |-- commit: feat: add login form component
  |     |-- commit: feat: add JWT authentication endpoint
  |     |-- commit: test: add auth flow integration tests
  |     |
  |     |-> Pull Request #42: "Add user authentication"
  |         - CI runs: lint, test, build (must all pass)
  |         - Code review: at least 1 approval required
  |         - Merge: squash and merge into main
  |
  |--- fix/cart-total-bug  (hotfix branch)
        |
        |-- commit: fix: use integer math for cart totals to avoid floating point errors
        |
        |-> Pull Request #43: "Fix cart total rounding error"
            - Same CI + review process
